Title: Turning Red
Writer: Domee Shi, Julia Cho, Sarah Streicher
Actors: Rosalie Chiang, Sandra Oh, Ava Morse
Plot: Mei Lee (voice of Rosalie Chiang) is a confident, dorky 13-year-old torn between staying her mother's dutiful daughter and the chaos of adolescence. Her protective, if not slightly overbearing mother, Ming (voice of Sandra Oh), is never far from her daughter - an unfortunate reality for the teenager. And as if changes to her interests, relationships and body weren't enough, whenever she gets too excited (which is practically ALWAYS), she "poofs" into a giant red panda.
Awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 9 wins & 92 nominations total
